final:
module d_flip_flop(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input d,
    output reg q
    );

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset)
            q <= 0; // Reset output to 0
        else
            q <= d; // Capture input value
    end
endmodule
